item.title: Deploy orchestration + preflight checks
item.intent: Make 'clawhq up' produce a running, reachable agent or a clear, actionable error — never silent failure. Every preflight check must block deploy if it fails.
item.description: USER MOMENT: This is what 'clawhq up' does — the user's first deploy experience. The full sequence (preflight -> compose -> firewall -> health -> smoke test) ensures the user gets a working agent or a clear error, never silent failure. Step-by-step progress reporting means the user isn't staring at a frozen terminal. Acceptance: 'clawhq up' produces a running agent; all 6 preflight checks surface actionable errors; health verify confirms agent is reachable before returning.
steps: Implement full deploy sequence: preflight -> compose up -> firewall apply -> health verify -> smoke test
Implement 6 preflight checks: Docker, images, config, secrets, ports, Ollama
Add graceful shutdown and restart with firewall reapply
Add AbortSignal support throughout the deploy pipeline
Implement step-by-step progress reporting via callback
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq up' produces a running agent or a clear, actionable error
All 6 preflight checks surface actionable errors on failure
Health verify confirms agent is reachable before returning success
Step-by-step progress visible in terminal during deploy
